expectations.evidence: Output identifies '.claude/try-claude/' as the runtime root directory throughout, including '런타임 디렉토리 생성' section and JSON output showing runtimeRoot.
Step 3 explicitly describes 'project.json 생성' with details about schemaVersion, pluginId, pluginVersion, lastSyncedAt, and managedReferences fields.

expectations.text: Lists runtime directories (references, plans, reports, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Step 1 lists runtime directories: references/, plans/, reports/, logs/, codemaps/, humanmaps/. Also confirmed in 'Current State' section listing all directories.

eval_feedback.overall: Without the skill, the agent still produced a thorough Korean-language result covering all assertions. Used more tool calls (14 vs 10) and took longer (63.5s vs 51s) compared to the with_skill run.
